services.title: Khai Island Self-Drive Adventure

services.f1: Self-Drive: Learn the basics and drive a mini speedboat with confidence
services.f2: Snorkeling: Crystal clear water, vibrant coral reefs, and Nemo clownfish
services.f3: Explore 5 Spots: Laem Maphrao, Khai Nui, Khai Nok, Khai Nai, Koh Lipeh
services.f4: Lunch on the Island: Enjoy a meal on Khai Nai island with friendly cats

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: FAQ — What you need to know before booking
faq.q1: Do I need a boat license?
faq.a1: No! Every boat comes with an experienced captain who will guide and teach you throughout the trip. No experience needed.
faq.q2: Can children join? Is there a minimum age?
faq.a2: Children aged 4 and above are welcome. Kids' life jackets are provided, and the captain watches over everyone at all times.
faq.a3: The half-day trip is approximately 4 hours (including driving, snorkeling, swimming, and lunch). Two rounds available: Morning 09:00-13:00 and Afternoon 14:00-18:00.
faq.a4: Free cancellation or rescheduling up to 48 hours before departure. In case of bad weather, rescheduling is free of charge.
faq.a5: Yes! Free hotel pickup and drop-off within Phuket. Morning pickup 07:30-07:45, afternoon pickup 12:30-12:45.

svc.hero_sub: Self-drive a mini speedboat to explore Khai Islands on the Andaman Sea
svc.overview_sub: Aquathrill Thailand invites you to explore the Andaman Sea in a unique way — learn, have fun, and enjoy the sea at your own pace
svc.overview_p1: Not just a boat ride, but the thrill of driving a mini speedboat yourself. With brand-new boats and experienced crew, you'll learn the basics and drive with confidence across the Andaman Sea, stopping to swim, snorkel, and explore islands.
svc.overview_p2: This trip combines self-driving, snorkeling, relaxation, and island exploration in one — simple, fun, and unforgettable with Aquathrill Thailand
svc.highlights_sub: 5 stops along the route, from Laem Maphrao to Khai Nai Island
svc.stop1_title: 1. Laem Maphrao — View Point
svc.stop1_desc: First stop of the trip, just ~5 minutes from the pier. A rocky cape jutting into the sea near Sunrise Beach, offering open sea views and peaceful atmosphere. Perfect for sightseeing and light photography before continuing.
svc.stop2_title: 2. Khai Nui Island
svc.stop2_desc: Small island in Phang Nga province, famous for crystal clear water and pristine coral reefs. No beach for walking — the main activity is snorkeling among staghorn and plate corals, swimming with colorful fish, and spotting Nemo clownfish in their natural habitat.
svc.stop3_title: 3. Khai Nok Island
svc.stop3_desc: Small island in Koh Yao, Phang Nga. Stunning white sandy beach, turquoise water, with a unique shape often compared to a 'fried egg in the sea'. Perfect for swimming, sunbathing, beach snorkeling. Restaurants, drinks, and beach chairs available on the island.
svc.stop4_title: 4. Khai Nai — Cat Island
svc.stop4_desc: Friendly atmosphere island with shallow clear water. The highlight is the resident cats that welcome tourists. Enjoy lunch on the island, then walk around, take photos, swim, and relax for about 1 hour before heading back to the pier.
svc.stop5_title: 5. Koh Li-Pe — The Bird Nest Island
svc.stop5_desc: It is tucked between Koh Yao Yai and Phuket. It is a major site for edible bird's nest harvesting. Because these nests are so valuable (the "white gold" of the sea), the island is often under strict guard by concession companies. Unlike tourist islands, you usually cannot land here. Most people see it from a distance during a boat tour through Phang Nga Bay.

rv.hero_sub: Real experiences from customers who trusted AQUATHRILL Mini Speedboat
rv.section_sub: Real voices from Mini Speedboat guests
rv.r1_text: "Driving the boat myself was so much fun! The captain taught us well, it wasn't hard at all. The sea at Khai Nui was crystal clear — we even saw clownfish. Definitely coming back!"
rv.r2_text: "Visited all 3 islands — snorkeling at Khai Nui was stunning, Khai Nok had the whitest sand beach, and at Khai Nai we played with the adorable cats. So cute!"
rv.r3_text: "Brought my girlfriend, we were really impressed! Got to drive the boat ourselves, the view at Laem Maprao was beautiful, saw lots of fish snorkeling, and the food on Khai Nai was delicious. Super chill vibes."
rv.r4_text: "The morning trip was perfect. Hotel pickup was on time, the captain was so kind and taught us to drive the boat properly. The 4-hour trip was fully packed — boat driving, snorkeling, lunch on the island. Everything!"
rv.r5_text: "First time here, absolutely impressed. The SEASTORM 14ft comfortably fits 4 people. The coral at Khai Nui was gorgeous, and the cats on Khai Nai were the cutest!"
rv.r6_text: "This is Thailand's first Self-Drive Mini Speedboat — so much fun! Easier to drive than I thought. Khai Nok beach looks just like a fried egg, beautiful from every angle. Highly recommend!"
rv.cta_sub: Book a Mini Speedboat trip today, get special discount

pp.hero_sub: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information
pp.s1_p1: AQUATHRILL ("we", "our") values the protection of our users' ("you", "user") personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your personal information in accordance with Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).
pp.s2_p1: We may collect the following personal information:
pp.s2_1_li4: Booking details (date, number of guests, selected services)
pp.s2_1_li5: Messages sent via the contact form
pp.s3_p1: We use your personal information to:
pp.s3_li1: Provide Mini Speedboat booking and related services
pp.s3_li3: Send news, promotions, and special offers (with your consent only)
pp.s4_p1: We will not sell, exchange, or disclose your personal information to third parties, except in the following cases:
pp.s4_li1: Service providers involved in trip operations (e.g., boat owners, crew)
pp.s4_li3: Government agencies as required by law
pp.s5_p1: We use appropriate security measures to protect your personal information, including:
pp.s6_li2: Analytics Cookies: To understand usage behavior and improve the website
pp.s6_p2: You can configure your browser to reject cookies, but this may affect some website functionality.
pp.s7_p1: Under the PDPA, you have the following rights:
pp.s7_li1: Right of Access: Request access to your personal data
pp.s7_li2: Right to Rectification: Request correction of inaccurate data
pp.s7_li3: Right to Erasure: Request deletion of personal data
pp.s7_li4: Right to Object: Object to data processing for certain purposes
pp.s7_li5: Right to Withdraw Consent: Withdraw previously given consent
pp.s7_li6: Right to Data Portability: Receive data in a machine-readable format
pp.s8_p1: We may update this policy from time to time. Changes take effect when published on the website. We recommend reviewing this policy regularly.
pp.s9_p1: If you have questions about our privacy policy or wish to exercise your PDPA rights, please contact us:

rp.hero_sub: Cancellation terms, refund conditions, and processing procedures
rp.s1_p1: AQUATHRILL ("we") is committed to providing transparent and fair services. This policy explains the cancellation terms, refund conditions, and processing procedures for our Mini Speedboat Khai Island tours in Phuket.
rp.s2_p1: Customers may cancel or change their travel date under the following conditions:
rp.s2_li1: 48+ hours advance notice: Free cancellation or rescheduling, no additional charges
rp.s2_li2: Less than 48 hours notice: Non-refundable, but may reschedule once (subject to availability)
rp.s3_p1: Refunds will be considered on a case-by-case basis:
rp.s3_1_li1: Adverse weather conditions: Free rescheduling or full refund
rp.s3_1_li2: Technical issues (boat, equipment): Free rescheduling or full refund
rp.s3_2_li2: Less than 48 hours notice: No refund (may reschedule once)
rp.s4_p1: To request a refund, please follow these steps:
rp.s4_li1: Step 1: Contact us via WhatsApp or email with your booking name, date, and reason for cancellation
rp.s4_li2: Step 2: Our team will verify and confirm your refund eligibility within 24 hours
rp.s4_li3: Step 3: Refund will be processed via the same payment method used for booking
rp.s5_li2: Credit/debit card: 7-14 business days (depending on issuing bank)
rp.s6_p1: This policy does not cover the following:
rp.s6_li1: Personal expenses incurred during the trip (additional food, drinks on the island, etc.)
rp.s6_li2: Damages caused by intentional misconduct or gross negligence
rp.s6_li3: Bookings made through third-party agents are subject to the agent's own terms
rp.s7_p1: We may update this policy from time to time. Changes take effect when published on the website. We recommend reviewing this policy before making a booking.
rp.s8_p1: If you have questions about our refund and cancellation policy or wish to request a refund, please contact us:

tos.hero_sub: Terms and conditions for using AQUATHRILL services
tos.s1_p1: Welcome to the AQUATHRILL website ("Website"), operated by AQUATHRILL ("we", "our"). By accessing this website or booking our services, you ("User", "Customer") agree to all terms and conditions herein. If you do not accept these terms, please stop using the website.
tos.s2_p1: AQUATHRILL provides Mini Speedboat rental services for Khai Island tours and the Andaman Sea area, Phuket, Thailand. Services include:
tos.s2_li1: Self-drive Mini Speedboat trips with an onboard captain
tos.s2_li2: Snorkeling equipment, life jackets, and safety gear
tos.s2_li3: Meals on the island (depending on selected package)
tos.s3_li1: Booking: Bookings are confirmed only after full payment is received.
tos.s3_li2: Payment Methods: Online payment via Payso (PaySolutions) — supports credit/debit cards, QR PromptPay, internet banking, 0% installments, and e-Wallet.
tos.s3_li3: Pricing: Prices shown on the website are in Thai Baht (THB) and may change without prior notice.
tos.s3_li4: Payment Security: Payment data is processed through the PCI DSS certified Payso (PaySolutions) gateway. We do not store your card information.
tos.s4_p1: Cancellation and refund policies follow our Refund and Cancellation Policy. In summary:
tos.s4_li1: Cancellation 48+ hours in advance: Full refund
tos.s4_li2: Cancellation less than 48 hours: No refund, but rescheduling is allowed once
tos.s4_li3: No-show: No refund and no rescheduling
tos.s5_li1: Age: Boat drivers must be 18 years or older. Children must be accompanied by a guardian throughout the trip.
tos.s5_li2: Health: Participants must be in good health with no medical conditions that may pose a risk for water activities. Please inform us in advance of any health concerns.
tos.s5_li3: Alcohol: Consumption of alcohol before and during boat operation is strictly prohibited.
tos.s5_li4: Life Jackets: All participants must wear life jackets at all times while on the boat.
tos.s5_li5: Captain's Instructions: Participants must strictly follow all instructions from the captain and crew.
tos.s6_li1: AQUATHRILL shall not be liable for damages caused by force majeure events such as weather, natural disasters, or government orders.
tos.s6_li2: We are not responsible for personal belongings lost or damaged during the trip.
tos.s6_li3: Damages caused by intentional or negligent actions of participants are the participant's own responsibility.
tos.s7_p1: All content on this website, including text, images, logos, graphics, and software, is the property of AQUATHRILL and is protected by intellectual property laws. Copying, modifying, or distributing without written permission is prohibited.
tos.s8_li1: Provide accurate and truthful information when booking and registering
tos.s8_li2: Not use the website for illegal or inappropriate purposes
tos.s8_li3: Not attempt to access unauthorized systems or data
tos.s8_li4: Be responsible for maintaining the security of your user account
tos.s9_p1: The collection, use, and protection of your personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy, which forms part of these Terms of Service.
tos.s10_p1: These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Thailand. Any disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of Thai courts.
tos.s11_p1: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on the website. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
tos.s12_p1: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at:
